stemHtml: Slat or flap asymmetry occurring after either extension or retraction, may have an effect on controllability since:

options.a: slat asymmetry causes a yawing moment, whereas flap asymmetry causes a large rolling moment.
options.b: slat and flap asymmetry both cause a large rolling moment.
options.c: slat asymmetry causes a large rolling moment, whereas flap asymmetry causes a large yawing moment.
options.d: slat and flap asymmetry both cause a large yawing moment.
